dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9464 IH: To prohibit the Secretary of Agriculture from closing any research and development facility of the Forest Service.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Goodlander (for herself and Mr. Pappas) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To prohibit the Secretary of Agriculture from closing any research and development facility of the Forest Service.

section.header: Prohibition on closure of Forest Service research and development facilities
section.text: The Secretary of Agriculture may not close any research and development facility of the Forest Service, including through implementation of a reorganization plan, except as expressly authorized by an Act of Congress enacted after the date of enactment of this Act.
